Notice Of Hearing On Motions Of To Lift Stay And For Dismissal Of Plaintiffs Petition For Declaratory Relief [Code Civ. Proc. 418.10(A)(2), 410.30(A)]
Off Calendar Oct-08-2024 Off Calendar

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Berman, 424-256-4757 Petitioner in Pro Per through Court Call
Glen Robert Olsen, Esq. 415-438-4483 and Sydney Allen, Esq. 415-438-4505 of Long & Levitt LLP for Respondent MINNESOTA LAWYERS MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D. Petitioner Argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT MINNESOTA LAWYERS MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S PETITIONE FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF (CODE CIV. PROC. 389(A) AND (B), 430.10(D)).

Taken Under Submission.* Respondent submits 2 proposed orders.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

*After the hearing, the Court signs an order on demurrer. (see scanned order for details)*

Notice Of Hearing On Motion Of Defendant/"Respondent" Minnesota Lawyers Mutual Insurance Company To Dismiss Or Stay Action On Forum Non Conveniens Grounds [Code Civ. Proc. §418.10(A)(2)]
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
